creator: daniel.tihanyi@tetragir.com
text:
Created attachment 216202
Rundeck3 update to 3.3.0

Rundeck 3.3.0 is released. Change log:
- Enhanced Scheduling Options (Enterprise)
- Guided Tour Manager (Enterprise)
- New Log Viewer
- User/Group Management Wizard (Enterprise)
- Node Wizard Plugin (Enterprise)
- Job Tags
- API Enhancements
- Extensive Engine Enhancements

Diff is attached.
